description: United India Insurance Company Limited is an Indian general insurance provider offering motor, health, travel, and other insurance products. Its public website primarily serves product, policyholder, and corporate information.
summary: No public developer integration surface was confirmed on uiic.co.in itself. The only discoverable API documentation references UIIC data through the separate government domain apisetu.gov.in, which is out of scope for uiic.co.in.
